privileged_info_summary: The task uses synthetic data generated during setup. The target workspace is /default-domain/workspaces/Projects. The agent must create a Note document with the title 'Strategy Meeting Notes' in this workspace. The source image document is named 'Whiteboard-Capture' and contains a synthetically-generated whiteboard image with a random project code (PROJ-XXXX format), budget amount, and action items including references to 'Backend Lead', 'Launch Beta', and other keywords. The image is generated using ImageMagick with randomly-selected numeric values for the project code and budget, ensuring anti-gaming validation.
